PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1.h
1 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_PIECEWISEFUNCTIONR2VR1_H
2 #define ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_PIECEWISEFUNCTIONR2VR1_H
3 /* Author : dechaiss at Wed Oct 14 10:55:20 2009
4  * Generated by createNew
5  */
6 
7 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
8 #include <arcane/utils/Math.h>
9 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
10 #include <arcane/utils/Array.h>
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/PieceWiseFunction/IPieceWiseFunction.h"
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IFunctionR2vR1.h"
14 #include <vector> // For vector use instead of Array
15 #include <arcane/utils/Limits.h> // For boundary behavior, Arcane tools
16 #include <arcane/utils/Exception.h>
17 #include <limits> // Boundary behavior std tools (to generate NaN)
18 
20 struct VectorType
21 {
22  enum eVectorType
23  {
24  row,
25  column
26  };
27 };
28 
29 class PWFArcaneTools
30 {
31 public:
32  typedef Arcane::RealSharedArray2 PWFArray2;
33  typedef Arcane::RealArrayView PWFArrayView;
34 
35  class PWFArray2View
36  {
37  public:
38  PWFArray2View(Arcane::RealArray2View all_data,
39  const Arcane::Integer dim1_first_index,
40  const Arcane::Integer dim1_size,
41  const Arcane::Integer dim2_first_index,
42  const Arcane::Integer dim2_size)
43  : m_all_data(all_data)
44  , m_dim1_first_index(dim1_first_index)
45  , m_dim1_size(dim1_size)
46  , m_dim2_first_index(dim2_first_index)
47  , m_dim2_size(dim2_size){}
48 
49  PWFArrayView operator[](const Arcane::Integer i)
50  {
51  ARCANE_ASSERT(i < m_dim1_size,(Arcane::String::format("Index out of bound in first dimension of piece wise function array 2 index {0} > size {1} ",i,m_dim1_size).localstr()));
52  return m_all_data[i + m_dim1_first_index].subView(m_dim2_first_index, m_dim2_size);
53  }
54 
55  private:
56  Arcane::RealArray2View m_all_data;
57  Arcane::Integer m_dim1_first_index;
58  Arcane::Integer m_dim1_size;
59  Arcane::Integer m_dim2_first_index;
60  Arcane::Integer m_dim2_size;
61  };
62 
63 public:
64  Arcane::Integer dim1Size(PWFArray2& data) {return data.dim1Size();}
65  Arcane::Integer dim2Size(PWFArray2& data) {return data.dim2Size();}
66  void resize(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer row_size, const Arcane::Integer column_size)
67  {
68  data.resize(row_size, column_size);
69  }
70  PWFArray2View view(PWFArray2& data,
71  const Arcane::Integer dim1_first_index, const Arcane::Integer dim1_bound_index,
72  const Arcane::Integer dim2_first_index, const Arcane::Integer dim2_bound_index)
73  {
74  // bound_index = last_index + 1 (unherited from previous boost implementation)
75  Arcane::Integer dim1_size = dim1_bound_index - dim1_first_index;
76  Arcane::Integer dim2_size = dim2_bound_index - dim2_first_index;
77  return PWFArray2View(data.view(), dim1_first_index, dim1_size, dim2_first_index, dim2_size);
78  }
79  void fillDim1(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer dim2_index, const Arcane::Real value)
80  {
81  // No extraction possible of first dimension with Arcane::Array2
82  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < data.dim1Size(); ++i)
83  {
84  data[i][dim2_index] = value;
85  }
86  }
87  void fillDim2(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Integer dim1_index, const Arcane::Real value)
88  {
89  PWFArrayView view = data[dim1_index];
90  std::fill(view.begin(), view.end(), value);
91  }
92 
93  void print(PWFArray2& data, ostream& o) const
94  {
95  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < data.dim1Size(); ++i)
96  {
97  for (Arcane::Integer j = 0; j < data.dim2Size(); ++j)
98  {
99  o << "\"";
100  o << data.item(i, j);
101  o << "\"";
102  }
103  }
104  }
105  void fill(PWFArray2& data, const Arcane::Real value)
106  {
107  data.fill(value);
108  }
109 
110 };
111 
112 typedef PWFArcaneTools PWFDataTools;
113 
114 // Template class PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T. Template argument is the interpolator
115 template<typename T>
116 class PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T :
117  public IPieceWiseFunction,
118  public IFunctionR2vR1,
119  public PWFDataTools
120 {
121 public:
123  typedef T TypeT;
124  typedef typename T::eProlongationType ProlongationType;
125 
126 public:
128  PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T(const PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T<T>& from)
129  : m_trace_mng(from.m_trace_mng)
130  , m_nb_variables(from.m_nb_variables)
131  , m_border_type(from.m_border_type)
132  , m_prolongation_type(from.m_prolongation_type)
133  , m_out_of_bound_value(from.m_out_of_bound_value)
134  , m_coef_right_derivative(from.m_coef_right_derivative)
135  , m_coef_left_derivative(from.m_coef_left_derivative)
136  , m_initialized(false)
137  , m_filled(false)
138  , m_boundary_defined(false)
139  {
140  for (Integer i = 0; i < m_nb_variables; i++)
141  {
142  m_inserted_point_number[i] = 0;
143  m_total_point_number[i] = 0;
144  }
145  initBorderCondition();
146  }
147 
148 public:
150  PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T(ITraceMng * trace_mng)
151  : m_trace_mng(trace_mng)
152  , m_nb_variables(2)
153  , m_border_type(BorderType::InfiniteProlongation)
154  , m_prolongation_type(T::ConstantProlongation)
155  , m_out_of_bound_value(std::numeric_limits<Real>::quiet_NaN())
156  , m_coef_right_derivative(0)
157  , m_coef_left_derivative(0)
158  , m_initialized(false)
159  , m_filled(false)
160  , m_boundary_defined(false)
161  {
162  for (Integer i = 0; i < m_nb_variables; i++)
163  {
164  m_inserted_point_number[i] = 0;
165  m_total_point_number[i] = 0;
166  }
167  }
168 
169  //
170 
172  virtual ~PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T()
173  {
174  ;
175  }
176 
177 public:
178  void init();
179 
181  void setParameter(const String & name, const Real & parameter)
182  {
183  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
184  }
185  void setParameter(Integer index, const Real & parameter)
186  {
187  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
188  }
189 
191  Integer nbParameter() const
192  {
193  return 0;
194  }
195 
197  String parameterName(Integer index) const
198  {
199  m_trace_mng->fatal() << "No parameter for PieceWiseFunction";
200  return "";
201  }
202 
204  Integer nbVariable() const
205  {
206  return m_nb_variables;
207  }
208 
210  virtual String variableName(Integer index) const;
211 
213  void setvariableName(Integer index, const String & name);
214 
216  void setVariable(const String & name, const Array<Real> & variable);
217  void setVariable(Integer index, const Array<Real> & variable);
218 
220  void setEvaluationResult(Array<Real> & result);
221 
223 
224  void setDerivationResult(Integer di, Array<Real> & result);
225  void setDerivationResult(const String & di, Array<Real> & result);
226 
228  void eval();
229 
231  void diffeval();
232 
234  void cleanup();
235 
237  inline Real eval(const Real & var0, const Real & var1);
238  void eval(const Real & var0, const Real & var1, Real & res0);
239 
241  void eval(const Array<Real> & var0, const Array<Real> & var1, Array<Real> & res0);
242  void eval(const ConstArrayView<Real> var0, const ConstArrayView<Real> var1, ArrayView<Real> res0);
243 
245  inline void eval(const Real & var0, const Real & var1, Real & result, Real & diffres0, Real & diffres1);
246 
248  inline Real diff0Eval(const Real & var0, const Real & var1);
249 
251  inline Real diff1Eval(const Real & var0, const Real & var1);
252 
253  void addTableVector(const RealArray & x0, const Real & x1, const RealArray & y,
254  const VectorType::eVectorType vectorType);
255 
257  void printPoints() const;
258 
260  void initBorderCondition(const BorderType::eBorderType& border_type,
261  const ProlongationType& prolongation_type, const Real& lower_row_limit,
262  const Real& upper_row_limit, const Real& lower_col_limit,
263  const Real& upper_col_limit, const BorderType::eCutType& cut_type);
264  void initBorderCondition();
265 
267  void setLimitDerivationStrategy(const LimitDerivationStrategy::eLimitDerivationStrategy & derivation_strategy);
268 
270  void shiftRescale(const Real new_xmin, const Real new_xmax, const Real new_ymin, const Real new_ymax);
271 
272  void clone(const PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T<T>& original_piecewisefunction)
273  {
274  throw Arcane::NotImplementedException(A_FUNCINFO);
275  }
276 
277  void getPieceWiseFunctionType(PieceWiseFunctionType& type) const;
278 
279 private:
281  ITraceMng * m_trace_mng;
282 
284  const Integer m_nb_variables;
285  String m_axe_name[2];
286 
288 
290  // typedef Array<Real> ComponentData; // To use Arcane::Array<Real> for storage (more costly at present)
291  // if Array is used : only 2 lines to change in setPoints(x,y) methode : push_back() <=> add()
292  typedef std::vector<Real> ComponentData; // To use std::vector for storage (more efficient cf. doc)
293  typedef ComponentData::iterator ComponentDataIterator;
294  ComponentData m_x[2], m_x_scan[2];
295  PWFDataTools::PWFArray2 m_y;
296 
297  Integer m_first_point_index[2], m_last_point_index[2];
298  Integer m_inserted_point_number[2], m_total_point_number[2]; // m_total_points_number = m_inserted_points_number + boundary_points_number
299 
301  BorderType::eBorderType m_border_type;
302  ProlongationType m_prolongation_type;
303  Real m_lower_limit[2], m_upper_limit[2], m_out_of_bound_value;
304  Integer m_coef_right_derivative, m_coef_left_derivative; // to define table point derivative choice (right or left)
305 
307  RealConstArrayView m_var[2];
308  RealArrayView m_eval_result;
309  RealArrayView m_diff_result[2];
310 
312  bool m_initialized;
314  bool m_filled;
316  bool m_boundary_defined;
317 
318  bool checkAxeDef(const RealArray & x0, const VectorType::eVectorType axeType);
319 
321  void initBorderType(const BorderType::eBorderType& border_type,
322  const ProlongationType& prolongation_type, const Real& lower_row_limit,
323  const Real& upper_row_limit, const Real& lower_col_limit,
324  const Real& upper_col_limit, const BorderType::eCutType& cut_type);
325  void initGhostPoints();
326  void updateGhostPoints();
327 };
328 
329 #include "PieceWiseFunctionR2vR1T.h"
